AA.S4.1.note: Live: with MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE='X\tY' and willAppear context C1, captured {event:'setFeedback', context:'C1', payload:{title:'X', artist:'Y'}}.

AA.S4.2.note: Live: with empty fixture, captured {title:'Apple Music', artist:''}.

AA.S4.3.note: Live: after willDisappear, feedback frames stop within one interval.

AA.S4.4.note: Live: changing pollIntervalMs from 2000 to 300 produced 5 feedback frames within 1.5s (vs <=1 at 2000ms).

AA.S4.5.note: Live: showArtist=false with fixture 'X\tY' produced payload {title:'X', artist:''}.
